summary.en: A unified API connecting accounting, e-commerce, and payment platforms for B2B fintech products.
summary.zh: 統一 API,串接會計、電商與支付平台,用於 B2B 金融科技產品。

highlight.en: Rutter offers one consistent schema across systems like QuickBooks, NetSuite, Shopify and Stripe, cutting integration work from months to days for fintechs.
highlight.zh: Rutter 以單一一致的 schema 串接 QuickBooks、NetSuite、Shopify、Stripe 等數百個系統,讓 Mercury、Airwallex 等金融科技公司的整合工作從數月縮短到數天。

summary.en: Local news, information, and classifieds app for users in India's small towns.
summary.zh: 為印度小城鎮用戶提供在地新聞、資訊與分類廣告的應用程式。

highlight.en: Lokal focuses on India's small-town audiences, bundling local news, information, and classifieds into a single app for an underserved regional market.
highlight.zh: Lokal 專注於印度小城鎮族群,將在地新聞、資訊與分類廣告整合在單一應用程式中,服務這個服務不足的區域市場。

summary.en: India's first neobank built for teenagers, with parent-supervised payments.
summary.zh: 印度首個為青少年打造的數位銀行,提供家長監督下的支付服務。

highlight.en: FamPay lets under-18s make UPI, P2P, and card payments without opening their own bank account, while parents fund and supervise spending.
highlight.zh: FamPay 讓未滿 18 歲的用戶無需開設銀行帳戶即可進行 UPI、P2P 與卡片支付,並由家長提供資金與監督花費。

summary.en: USD mobile banking for people and businesses in Latin America.
summary.zh: 為拉丁美洲個人與企業提供美元行動銀行服務。

highlight.en: Valiu aimed to give individuals and businesses access to stable USD in Latin America's depreciating, hyper-inflationary economies.
highlight.zh: Valiu 致力於在拉丁美洲貶值且惡性通膨的經濟環境中,讓個人與企業能取得穩定的美元。

summary.en: Software helping cannabis businesses stay compliant and run daily operations.
summary.zh: 協助大麻企業維持法規合規並管理日常營運的軟體。

highlight.en: Canix builds modern software spanning cultivation, processing, and distribution to help cannabis operators handle daunting compliance rules.
highlight.zh: Canix 打造涵蓋種植、加工到配送的現代軟體,協助大麻業者應對繁瑣的合規規範,並奪得 2020 年 TechCrunch Disrupt 冠軍。

summary.en: Develops drugs targeting transcription factors using AI and high-throughput RNA sequencing.
summary.zh: 運用 AI 與高通量 RNA 定序,開發針對轉錄因子的藥物。

highlight.en: Arpeggio Bio targets 'undruggable' proteins like NRF2, TEAD, and GPX4, with a lead program for IO-resistant melanoma and partnerships with J&J and FORMA.
highlight.zh: Arpeggio Bio 鎖定 NRF2、TEAD、GPX4 等「不可成藥」蛋白,主力專案針對 IO 抗藥性黑色素瘤,並與嬌生(J&J)及 FORMA 建立平台合作。

summary.en: Pull requests as a service, blending AI models with full-time engineers.
summary.zh: 以服務形式交付 Pull Request,結合 AI 模型與全職工程師。

highlight.en: Assign a ticket to GitStart Bot and it orchestrates AI models and engineers, running peer reviews until PRs are merge-ready; you only pay for merged PRs.
highlight.zh: 將工單指派給 GitStart Bot,它便調度 AI 模型與工程師,經同儕審查直到 PR 可合併;你只需為已合併的 PR 付費。

summary.en: Events and online communities supporting women at midlife and beyond.
summary.zh: 為中年及以上女性打造的活動與線上社群。

highlight.en: Revel offered events and communities for women in midlife, backed by Forerunner Ventures and YC, and named a Fast Company Most Innovative Company of 2020.
highlight.zh: Revel 為中年女性提供活動與社群,獲 Forerunner Ventures 與 YC 支持,並入選 Fast Company 2020 年最具創新力公司。

summary.en: Makes it easy to open and run a small K-8 microschool in your neighborhood.
summary.zh: 讓人輕鬆在社區內開設並經營小型 K-8 微型學校。

highlight.en: Prenda equips an adult guide, often a parent, to run a microschool of up to 10 students, providing training, software, curriculum, and funding to get paid.
highlight.zh: Prenda 讓一位成人引導者(通常是家長)經營最多 10 名學生的微型學校,並提供培訓、軟體、課程、支援與資金,讓引導者獲得報酬。

summary.en: A collaborative SQL editor for data teams to write, visualize, and share queries.
summary.zh: 供資料團隊撰寫、視覺化並分享查詢的協作式 SQL 編輯器。

highlight.en: PopSQL replaces fragmented workflows of rewriting queries and pasting SQL into Slack with one tool used by data teams at over 2000 companies.
highlight.zh: PopSQL 以單一工具取代重寫查詢、把 SQL 貼到 Slack 等零散流程,已被 DoorDash、Redfin 等逾 2000 家公司的資料團隊採用。

summary.en: Shopify for a mobile-first world, helping small businesses build e-commerce sites and apps.
summary.zh: 行動優先版的 Shopify,協助小型企業打造電商網站與行動應用。

highlight.en: Namaste lets small businesses build their own e-commerce website and native mobile apps, publishing to Google Play and the Apple App Store with one button.
highlight.zh: Namaste 讓小型企業建立自家電商網站與原生行動應用,並可一鍵發布到 Google Play 與 Apple App Store。

summary.en: Building XR and AI tools to transform game and virtual-world development.
summary.zh: 打造 XR 與 AI 工具,革新遊戲與虛擬世界的開發方式。

highlight.en: Ramen VR previously built Zenith: The Last City, a top VR game on Steam and Quest, and has raised over $40m to develop its next game and game-dev tools.
highlight.zh: Ramen VR 曾打造 Steam 與 Quest 上的頂尖 VR 遊戲《Zenith: The Last City》,並募得逾 4000 萬美元開發下一款遊戲及遊戲開發工具。

summary.en: Accounting and treasury management software for Web3 organizations.
summary.zh: 為 Web3 組織提供的會計與資金管理軟體。

highlight.en: Multis generates accurate financial statements and automates accounting across any crypto wallets, letting Web3 teams skip the hassle and focus on growth.
highlight.zh: Multis 跨任何加密錢包產出準確的財務報表並自動化會計作業,讓 Web3 團隊免去繁瑣事務、專注成長。

summary.en: HR-focused ERP that automates staff management for mid and large LATAM companies.
summary.zh: 以人資為核心的 ERP,為拉丁美洲中大型企業自動化員工管理。

highlight.en: Alana bundles shift planning, geolocation check-in with facial recognition, health and safety records, performance, and career planning into one HR ERP.
highlight.zh: Alana 將排班、含臉部辨識的定位打卡、健康安全紀錄、績效與職涯規劃整合進單一人資 ERP,服務零售、製造與餐旅業。

summary.en: Provides last-mile delivery for satellites in space.
summary.zh: 為衛星提供太空中的最後一哩運送服務。

highlight.en: EPIC AEROSPACE focuses on space logistics, offering last-mile delivery that moves satellites to their final orbits.
highlight.zh: EPIC AEROSPACE 專注於太空物流,提供將衛星送往最終軌道的最後一哩運送服務。

summary.en: An incredibly fast all-in-one toolkit for JavaScript and TypeScript.
summary.zh: 極速的 JavaScript 與 TypeScript 一站式工具組。

highlight.en: Bun bundles building, installing, running, and testing JS/TS into one fast toolkit, born from frustration with the fragmented, slow JavaScript ecosystem.
highlight.zh: Bun 將建置、安裝、執行與測試 JS/TS 整合進單一高速工具組,源於對零散且緩慢的 JavaScript 生態系的不滿。

summary.en: An all-in-one recruiting solution combining free ATS software with flexible recruiting services.
summary.zh: 結合免費 ATS 軟體與彈性招募服務的一站式招募解決方案。

highlight.en: Dover pairs a lightweight free applicant tracking system, as easy as a spreadsheet, with an on-demand marketplace of top-tier fractional recruiters.
highlight.zh: Dover 將如試算表般易用的輕量免費應徵者追蹤系統,與按需的頂尖兼職招募顧問市集結合,服務新創公司。

summary.en: A money manager app aimed at Gen-Z, offering credit-building, savings, and college funding.
summary.zh: 鎖定 Z 世代的理財管家應用,提供信用累積、儲蓄與大學資金。

highlight.en: For $20/mo, Path gives Gen-Z a money manager that helps with college funding, credit-building debit cards, and a high-interest savings account.
highlight.zh: Path 以每月 20 美元提供 Z 世代理財管家,協助大學資金、可累積信用的簽帳卡,以及高利率儲蓄帳戶。

summary.en: A digital bank for newcomers to the U.S., offering accounts and credit without an SSN.
summary.zh: 為赴美新移民打造的數位銀行,無需 SSN 即可開戶與辦卡。

highlight.en: Sable lets internationals open a U.S. bank account in five minutes and start building credit from day one without an SSN or prior U.S. credit history.
highlight.zh: Sable 讓國際人士在五分鐘內開設美國銀行帳戶,並在無 SSN 或既有美國信用紀錄下,從第一天起累積信用。

summary.en: Next-generation surgical navigation and robotics for image-guided procedures.
summary.zh: 用於影像導引手術的新世代手術導航與機器人技術。

highlight.en: Zeta Surgical applies AI and computer vision for high-accuracy image guidance in minutes; its Navigation and TMS Navigation systems are FDA-cleared in the U.S.
highlight.zh: Zeta Surgical 運用 AI 與電腦視覺,在數分鐘內提供高精度影像導引;其導航與 TMS 導航系統已獲 FDA 核准並在美國銷售。

summary.en: AI-driven predictive exploration and drilling for critical metal deposits.
summary.zh: 以 AI 驅動的關鍵金屬礦床預測探勘與鑽探。

highlight.en: EARTH AI pairs AI prospecting with a claimed 66% versus 0.5% success rate and Low Disturbance Drilling that is 1/4 cheaper and 4X faster for site testing.
highlight.zh: EARTH AI 結合 AI 探勘(宣稱成功率達 66% 對比 0.5%)與低擾動鑽探技術,使場址測試成本降至四分之一、速度快四倍。

summary.en: Boost Biomes is an industrials startup from the Summer 2019 YC batch.
summary.zh: Boost Biomes 是 2019 年夏季 YC 梯次的工業類新創公司。

highlight.en: Boost Biomes operates in the industrials sector; no further public description is available in the source data.
highlight.zh: Boost Biomes 屬於工業領域;來源資料中未提供更多公開描述。

summary.en: Point-of-sale financing for Latin America's middle class.
summary.zh: 為拉丁美洲中產階級提供銷售點融資。

highlight.en: Apurata offers instant underwriting at the point of sale, online or in-store, focused on small purchases ranging from $100 to $1000.
highlight.zh: Apurata 在線上或實體銷售點提供即時核貸,專注於 100 至 1000 美元的小額消費。

summary.en: Open-source, self-hosted session replay tool for developers.
summary.zh: 為開發者打造的開源、自架式 session replay 工具。

highlight.en: OpenReplay is an open-source, self-hosted alternative to FullStory and LogRocket, giving teams complete control over their data and costs.
highlight.zh: OpenReplay 是 FullStory 與 LogRocket 的開源自架式替代方案,讓團隊完全掌控自身資料與成本。

summary.en: An operating system for edge computing, powered by WebAssembly.
summary.zh: 以 WebAssembly 驅動、面向邊緣運算的作業系統。

highlight.en: Wasmer mixes Docker-like containers with far faster startup, an npm-style WebAssembly package manager (wapm.io), and a more universal JVM-like runtime.
highlight.zh: Wasmer 結合啟動更快的類 Docker 容器、類 npm 的 WebAssembly 套件管理器(wapm.io),以及更通用的類 JVM 執行環境。

summary.en: India's largest podcast platform.
summary.zh: 印度最大的 Podcast 平台。

highlight.en: Khabri positioned itself as India's largest podcast platform, serving audio content to a local-language audience.
highlight.zh: Khabri 自我定位為印度最大的 Podcast 平台,為在地語言用戶提供音訊內容。

summary.en: Sets up immigrants with a free US bank account, credit card, and SIM card.
summary.zh: 為移民免費設置美國銀行帳戶、信用卡與 SIM 卡。

highlight.en: Swadesh bundles a free FDIC-insured account, fee-free credit card, cheaper AT&T SIM, and remittance, starting with Indian expats moving to the US.
highlight.zh: Swadesh 將免費的 FDIC 保險帳戶、零費用信用卡、更便宜的 AT&T SIM 卡與匯款整合為一站式服務,先服務每年逾 15 萬名赴美的印度移民。

summary.en: A monthly subscription that offsets your carbon footprint.
summary.zh: 以月費訂閱抵銷個人碳足跡的服務。

highlight.en: Wren lets anyone offset their footprint by funding credible nature, industry, and policy projects, while also showing users how to reduce emissions.
highlight.zh: Wren 讓任何人透過資助可信的自然、產業與政策專案抵銷碳足跡,同時告訴用戶如何減少排放。

summary.en: Portable through-wall radar giving first responders X-ray-like vision.
summary.zh: 可攜式穿牆雷達,為第一線應變人員提供類似透視的能力。

highlight.en: Lumineye builds tactical through-wall radar sensors that help first responders and soldiers detect and track people behind walls.
highlight.zh: Lumineye 打造戰術型穿牆雷達感測器,協助第一線應變人員與士兵偵測並追蹤牆後人員。

summary.en: Delivers hair-loss medicines to Indian men on a subscription basis.
summary.zh: 以訂閱方式為印度男性配送掉髮治療藥物。

highlight.en: Nonu offered subscription delivery of hair-loss medication tailored to Indian men.
highlight.zh: Nonu 提供針對印度男性的掉髮藥物訂閱配送服務。

summary.en: A virtual office for remote and distributed teams.
summary.zh: 為遠端與分散式團隊打造的虛擬辦公室。

highlight.en: Tandem shows who's online and what app they're in, enabling one-click talk, screenshare, and video by translating a physical office into a virtual space.
highlight.zh: Tandem 顯示誰在線上、正在使用哪個應用,並支援一鍵通話、螢幕分享與視訊,把實體辦公室的優點轉化到虛擬空間。

summary.en: Financed students' education through Income Share Agreements.
summary.zh: 透過收入分成協議(ISA)為學生提供教育融資。

highlight.en: Blair raised a $100M+ debt fund to finance thousands of US students via Income Share Agreements before selling all assets in 2022 amid regulatory changes.
highlight.zh: Blair 募集逾 1 億美元的債務基金,透過收入分成協議資助數千名美國學生,後因法規變動於 2022 年出售全部資產。

summary.en: Lets anyone vibe code games with no coding skills required.
summary.zh: 讓任何人無需程式技能即可用「氛圍編碼」做遊戲。

highlight.en: Rosebud AI opens game creation to non-coders, letting anyone build games through a vibe-coding approach.
highlight.zh: Rosebud AI 讓不會寫程式的人也能透過「氛圍編碼」方式打造遊戲,降低遊戲創作門檻。

summary.en: Real-time coaching software that listens to sales calls and surfaces suggestions.
summary.zh: 即時輔導軟體,聆聽銷售通話並適時提供建議。

highlight.en: Wingman listens to inside-sales calls and surfaces live cues to reps, then transcribes and analyzes calls for postmortems, reviews, and coaching.
highlight.zh: Wingman 聆聽內勤銷售通話並即時向業務提供提示,並將通話轉錄與分析,用於覆盤、檢討與輔導。

summary.en: Teaches startups how to build a scalable growth engine through programs and an agency.
summary.zh: 透過課程與代理服務,教新創打造可規模化的成長引擎。

highlight.en: Demand Curve offers a growth program trusted by 3,000+ startups, a newsletter reaching 100,000+ readers, and a full-service growth agency.
highlight.zh: Demand Curve 提供獲逾 3000 家新創(含逾 500 家 YC 公司)採用的成長課程、觸及逾 10 萬讀者的電子報,以及全方位成長代理服務。

summary.en: AI that transforms video monitoring without using facial recognition.
summary.zh: 以 AI 革新影像監控,且不使用臉部辨識。

highlight.en: Traces analyzes thousands of video streams to find and track people without facial recognition, with API uses like people counting and forensic search.
highlight.zh: Traces 分析數千路影像串流,在不使用臉部辨識下尋找並追蹤人員,API 應用包含不重複人流計數、鑑識搜尋與誤報過濾。

summary.en: A high-speed scientific computing platform for simulating complex physics.
summary.zh: 用於模擬複雜物理現象的高速科學運算平台。

highlight.en: Vorticity re-imagines scientific computing down to processor architecture so engineers can simulate fusion reactors or aircraft before building prototypes.
highlight.zh: Vorticity 從處理器架構層級重新設計科學運算,讓工程師能在打造昂貴原型前先模擬核融合反應爐或飛行器,並已服務能源與生命科學領域。

summary.en: Workforce, recruitment, and payroll solutions for the construction industry.
summary.zh: 為營建業提供人力、招募與薪資解決方案。

highlight.en: BuildStream supplies reliable temporary construction workers quickly, saving clients 35% on agency fees while giving workers better, faster pay.
highlight.zh: BuildStream 快速供應可靠的臨時營建工人,為客戶省下 35% 的仲介費,同時讓工人獲得更好、更快的薪資與在地工作選擇。

summary.en: Makes a urine test that helps women get pregnant.
summary.zh: 開發協助女性受孕的尿液檢測產品。

highlight.en: Zergo developed a urine-based test designed to help women improve their chances of getting pregnant.
highlight.zh: Zergo 開發以尿液為基礎的檢測,旨在協助女性提高受孕機率。

summary.en: SaaS helping renewables and energy storage operate more profitably.
summary.zh: 協助再生能源與儲能更有利可圖地營運的 SaaS。

highlight.en: Gaiascope simplifies grid forecasting for wind, solar, and storage assets, and runs a quant fund trading electricity to refine its software.
highlight.zh: Gaiascope 簡化風電、太陽能與儲能資產的電網預測,並經營一檔交易電力的量化基金,以建立客戶信任並持續改善軟體。

summary.en: An app that helps people feel better and care for their mental health.
summary.zh: 協助人們改善情緒、照顧心理健康的應用程式。

highlight.en: Stoic helps users understand what influences how they feel and what to do about it, with over 4 million downloads and a 4.8/5 average across 100,000+ reviews.
highlight.zh: Stoic 協助用戶了解影響情緒的因素與改善方法,下載量逾 400 萬次,逾 10 萬則評論平均達 4.8/5 分。

summary.en: Building a payment network for alternative payments in Latin America.
summary.zh: 為拉丁美洲打造另類支付的支付網路。

highlight.en: Flux brings buy-now-pay-later and non-card credit acceptance to on-site merchants, providing instant issuing, acceptance, and a terminal for alternative credit.
highlight.zh: Flux 將先買後付與非卡片信用的受理帶到實體商家,提供即時發卡、支付受理,以及另類信用的支付終端機。

summary.en: An applied reinforcement learning research laboratory, acquired by Scale AI.
summary.zh: 應用強化學習研究實驗室,已被 Scale AI 收購。

highlight.en: Symplex was an applied reinforcement learning research lab that was acquired by Scale AI.
highlight.zh: Symplex 是一間應用強化學習研究實驗室,後被 Scale AI 收購。

summary.en: An AppLovin-style platform for the food community.
summary.zh: 為美食社群打造的類 AppLovin 平台。

highlight.en: Jupiter positions itself as AppLovin for the food community, building infrastructure around food-focused engagement.
highlight.zh: Jupiter 將自身定位為美食社群版的 AppLovin,圍繞美食互動打造基礎建設。

summary.en: A data platform built on the Activity Schema to answer any business question.
summary.zh: 建立於 Activity Schema 之上、可回答任何商業問題的資料平台。

highlight.en: Narrator lets analysts define a single user journey using the Activity Schema and reuse it to answer any question, helping small teams move fast.
highlight.zh: Narrator 讓分析師以 Activity Schema 定義單一用戶旅程,並重複用來回答任何問題,使小團隊能快速行動並降低資料倉儲運算成本。

summary.en: Enterprise SaaS that helps large real estate owners manage property taxes.
summary.zh: 協助大型不動產業主管理房地產稅的企業級 SaaS。

highlight.en: TaxProper acquires real-time tax data, encodes local rules, and automates payments, liability forecasting, and appeals for large real estate operators.
highlight.zh: TaxProper 取得即時稅務資料、編碼在地法規,並為大型不動產業者自動化稅款繳納、稅負預測與申訴流程。

summary.en: Helps top engineers from emerging markets land jobs abroad.
summary.zh: 協助新興市場頂尖工程師取得海外工作。

highlight.en: Outtalent backs undervalued engineers from markets like Russia, Ukraine, and Central Asia, helping them land jobs at Google, Amazon, and Microsoft abroad.
highlight.zh: Outtalent 支持來自俄羅斯、烏克蘭與中亞等市場被低估的工程師,協助他們在美國、加拿大與歐洲取得 Google、Amazon、Microsoft 等公司的工作。

summary.en: Makes engineering interviews look more like real on-the-job work.
summary.zh: 讓工程面試更貼近真實的實際工作。

highlight.en: Hatchways offers customizable GitHub-based assessments where candidates review code, submit pull requests, or improve designs, easing interview load.
highlight.zh: Hatchways 提供可客製的 GitHub 評測,讓應徵者審查程式碼、提交 Pull Request 或改善設計,並減輕工程師的面試負擔。

summary.en: A personal CRM that reminds you to keep in touch with people.
summary.zh: 提醒你與重要人脈保持聯繫的個人 CRM。

highlight.en: Dex is a lightweight personal CRM with a Chrome extension that manages relationships inside Facebook, Twitter, and other social apps, plus reminders.
highlight.zh: Dex 是輕量個人 CRM,透過 Chrome 擴充功能在 Facebook、Twitter 等社群應用中管理人脈,並以可行動的提醒協助你保持聯繫。

summary.en: A marketplace for fractional real estate investing, billed as the NASDAQ for real estate.
summary.zh: 房地產零股投資市集,自詡為「房地產的那斯達克」。

highlight.en: Lofty lets sellers fractionalize property equity so anyone can invest from $50, browse assets from strip malls to rentals, and trade with no lockup period.
highlight.zh: Lofty 讓賣家將房產股權碎片化,任何人最低 50 美元即可投資,瀏覽從商場到出租屋的標的,五分鐘內完成購買,且無鎖倉期可自由交易。

summary.en: An all-in-one health program helping seniors with daily function.
summary.zh: 協助長者維持日常功能的一站式健康計畫。

highlight.en: Mighty Health offered an all-in-one health program focused on helping seniors maintain and improve their daily physical function.
highlight.zh: Mighty Health 提供一站式健康計畫,專注於協助長者維持並改善日常的身體功能。

summary.en: Builds robotic workforces for the food and beverage industry.
summary.zh: 為餐飲業打造機器人勞動力。

highlight.en: Yummy Future deploys robots to handle repetitive, labor-intensive restaurant tasks, aiming to ease high turnover and let workers focus on customers.
highlight.zh: Yummy Future 部署機器人與機器處理餐廳中重複且勞力密集的工作,旨在緩解高流動率,讓員工專注於服務顧客。

summary.en: An institutional equities broker-dealer.
summary.zh: 機構級股票經紀自營商。

highlight.en: Proof Trading operates as an institutional equities broker-dealer serving the trading needs of institutional investors.
highlight.zh: Proof Trading 為機構級股票經紀自營商,服務機構投資人的交易需求。

summary.en: Holy Grail is a B2B startup from the Summer 2019 YC batch.
summary.zh: Holy Grail 是 2019 年夏季 YC 梯次的 B2B 新創公司。

highlight.en: Holy Grail operates in the B2B sector; no further public description is available in the source data.
highlight.zh: Holy Grail 屬於 B2B 領域;來源資料中未提供更多公開描述。

summary.en: A professional network where women succeed at work together.
summary.zh: 讓女性在職場上互相成就的專業人脈網路。

highlight.en: Elpha is a community where women pursue personal and professional development, find jobs, and make friends.
highlight.zh: Elpha 是一個社群,讓女性在此追求個人與職涯發展、尋找工作並結交朋友。

summary.en: A copilot for product teams that helps them listen to users at scale.
summary.zh: 協助產品團隊大規模傾聽用戶的 copilot。

highlight.en: Kraftful helps product builders analyze user feedback at scale so they can make something people actually want.
highlight.zh: Kraftful 協助產品打造者大規模分析用戶回饋,以打造真正符合用戶需求的產品。

summary.en: Turns manual healthcare processes into automated workflows.
summary.zh: 將人工醫療流程轉化為自動化工作流。

highlight.en: Shift Health helps large provider groups and hospitals automate mundane, repetitive tasks so healthcare workers can focus on patients.
highlight.zh: Shift Health 協助大型醫療團體與醫院自動化繁瑣重複的工作,讓醫護人員能專注於照顧病患。

summary.en: A multiplayer, chat-like browser built on Chromium that knows you.
summary.zh: 建立於 Chromium、了解你的多人協作型聊天式瀏覽器。

highlight.en: Muddy organizes work into Spaces where teams share messages, files from apps like Google Docs, Figma, and Airtable, and take action on those apps inline.
highlight.zh: Muddy 將工作組織為「Spaces」,讓團隊分享訊息與來自 Google Docs、Figma、Airtable 等應用的檔案,並可直接在訊息中對這些應用採取行動。

summary.en: Building flying wind turbines using tethered electric kites.
summary.zh: 以繫繩電動風箏打造會飛的風力發電機。

highlight.en: Kitekraft's tethered kites carry eight onboard turbines and fly autonomous figure-eights to generate power, using 10x less material than a normal turbine.
highlight.zh: Kitekraft 的繫繩風箏搭載八具機載渦輪,自主飛行「8」字形以發電,所需建材比傳統風機少 10 倍、成本只需一半。

summary.en: Develops repellent surface coatings that contain no PFAS.
summary.zh: 開發不含 PFAS 的防污排斥性表面塗層。

highlight.en: spotLESS Materials' PFAS-free coating, first sold to consumers, now expands into industrial use, reducing fouling from mud, ice, and sludge on many surfaces.
highlight.zh: spotLESS Materials 的無 PFAS 塗層最初面向消費者,如今擴展到工業應用,減少泥土、冰與汙泥在玻璃、金屬、陶瓷及塑膠表面的附著。

summary.en: Index is a modern business intelligence platform for data teams.
summary.zh: Index 是為資料團隊打造的現代商業智慧平台。

highlight.en: Index combines powerful SQL with a collaborative workspace so analysts can rapidly create, share, and explore interactive dashboards for faster decisions.
highlight.zh: Index 結合強大的 SQL 與協作工作區,讓分析師能快速建立、分享並探索互動式儀表板,加速資料驅動決策。

summary.en: A living workspace where one prompt becomes a collaborative app for teams.
summary.zh: 以單一提示生成團隊協作應用的活性工作空間。

highlight.en: Taskade turns a single prompt into live dashboards, websites, and tools tied to a workspace where agents plan, act, and learn, with no code or setup.
highlight.zh: Taskade 將單一提示轉為即時的儀表板、網站與工具,並連結到一個由 AI 代理規劃、執行與學習的工作空間,無需程式碼或設定。

summary.en: A digital insurance broker for SMEs in Latin America.
summary.zh: 為拉丁美洲中小企業服務的數位保險經紀商。

highlight.en: Covela helps small businesses and freelancers in LATAM find the right insurance coverage at the right price in under 15 minutes.
highlight.zh: Covela 協助拉丁美洲的小型企業與自由工作者在 15 分鐘內,以合適的價格找到合適的保險方案。

summary.en: Empowers local retailers with e-commerce expertise delivered as a service.
summary.zh: 以服務形式提供電商專業,賦能在地零售商。

highlight.en: Matagora offers affordable e-commerce expertise as a service, handling back-office, marketing, and POS so independent retailers can focus on their stores.
highlight.zh: Matagora 以平價的服務形式提供電商專業,代理後台、行銷、電商與 POS 管理,讓獨立零售商能專注於商品與店內體驗。

summary.en: An all-in-one business platform and store for content creators and managers.
summary.zh: 為內容創作者與經紀人打造的一站式商業平台與商店。

highlight.en: Pillar gives content creators and talent managers an all-in-one creator store and business platform.
highlight.zh: Pillar 為內容創作者與藝人經紀人提供一站式的創作者商店與商業平台。

summary.en: Helps families plan and pay for funerals in one place.
summary.zh: 協助家庭在單一平台規劃與支付喪葬費用。

highlight.en: Ever Loved is a one-stop shop for funeral planning, helping families raise the funds needed (about $9,000 on average), find vendors, and bring people together.
highlight.zh: Ever Loved 是喪葬規劃的一站式平台,協助家庭籌措所需經費(平均約 9000 美元)、尋找服務商,並讓社群在線上與線下凝聚。

summary.en: Uses AI to help general contractors understand construction plans faster.
summary.zh: 運用 AI 協助總承包商更快讀懂施工圖。

highlight.en: Downtobid automatically identifies scopes of work, finds qualified local subcontractors, and sends personalized bid invites for general contractors.
highlight.zh: Downtobid 自動辨識工程範圍、尋找合格的在地分包商,並為總承包商發送個人化的投標邀請。

summary.en: Builds games that help brands engage, convert, and retain customers.
summary.zh: 打造遊戲,協助品牌吸引、轉換並留住顧客。

highlight.en: PlayAbly replaces lifeless popups and forms with gamified conversion layers like quizzes and swipe games; its founders came from Unity's personalization team.
highlight.zh: PlayAbly 以測驗、滑動遊戲等遊戲化轉換層取代乏味的彈窗與表單,驅動行動並蒐集第一方資料;其創辦團隊曾在 Unity 為逾 20 億用戶個人化遊戲體驗。

summary.en: A next-generation CMS built for mobile apps.
summary.zh: 為行動應用打造的新世代內容管理系統。

highlight.en: Unflow lets product and marketing teams create and publish native in-app experiences without engineering help.
highlight.zh: Unflow 讓產品與行銷團隊無需工程協助,即可建立並發布原生的應用內體驗。

summary.en: Uses machine learning to design proteins for sustainably feeding the world.
summary.zh: 運用機器學習設計蛋白質,以永續方式餵養世界。

highlight.en: Shiru leverages machine learning to discover and create novel proteins aimed at feeding the world more sustainably.
highlight.zh: Shiru 運用機器學習發現並打造新型蛋白質,目標是以更永續的方式餵養世界。

summary.en: AI that remembers your book and helps you finish writing it.
summary.zh: 記住你整本書並協助你寫完的 AI。

highlight.en: Plotdrive is a continuous production system that holds an entire story's shape while authors write, with writers reporting 5-10x throughput gains.
highlight.zh: Plotdrive 是一套持續創作系統,在作者寫作時掌握整個故事的全貌,作者表示產出效率提升 5 至 10 倍,且不失個人風格。

summary.en: A chat game universe.
summary.zh: 聊天遊戲宇宙。

highlight.en: Gamebytes builds a universe of games delivered through chat experiences.
highlight.zh: Gamebytes 打造一個透過聊天體驗呈現的遊戲宇宙。

summary.en: Bayes is a B2B startup from the Summer 2019 YC batch.
summary.zh: Bayes 是 2019 年夏季 YC 梯次的 B2B 新創公司。

highlight.en: Bayes operates in the B2B sector; no further public description is available in the source data.
highlight.zh: Bayes 屬於 B2B 領域;來源資料中未提供更多公開描述。

summary.en: A collaborative data notebook for business teams.
summary.zh: 為商業團隊打造的協作式資料 notebook。

highlight.en: Intersect Labs lets teams bring data from various sources, process it, and send it to a destination in a few clicks, repeating the pipeline on a schedule.
highlight.zh: Intersect Labs 讓團隊只需幾下點擊,即可從各種來源匯入資料、處理並送往指定目的地,並可每天、每週或每月重複此流程。

summary.en: Brings all your live data into one place, as easy as a spreadsheet.
summary.zh: 將所有即時資料匯聚一處,操作如試算表般簡單。

highlight.en: Actiondesk is as easy and flexible as a spreadsheet but as powerful as a BI tool, giving teams access to all their live data in one place.
highlight.zh: Actiondesk 兼具試算表的易用彈性與 BI 工具的強大功能,讓團隊在單一介面存取所有即時資料。

summary.en: Writes ML software to price and select insurance risk more accurately.
summary.zh: 開發機器學習軟體,更精準地評估與定價保險風險。

highlight.en: Soteris is building a first-of-its-kind ML pricing system for insurance, starting with personal auto.
highlight.zh: Soteris 正打造首創的保險機器學習定價系統,從個人車險起步。

summary.en: User behavior monitoring for modern product teams.
summary.zh: 為現代產品團隊提供的用戶行為監控。

highlight.en: Lantern monitors user behavior autonomously, requiring no code, no configuration, and no data expertise to run.
highlight.zh: Lantern 自主監控用戶行為,運作時無需程式碼、無需設定,也不需要資料專業知識。

summary.en: ML-powered hearing aids that work in noisy places like restaurants.
summary.zh: 以機器學習驅動、能在餐廳等吵雜場所運作的助聽器。

highlight.en: AudioFocus uses acoustics-informed machine learning and custom microphone arrays to enhance only nearby voices, tackling the industry's biggest unmet need.
highlight.zh: AudioFocus 運用聲學導向的機器學習與客製麥克風陣列,只增強鄰近的人聲,解決在吵雜環境聆聽這項業界最大的未滿足需求。

summary.en: An open-source dependency security tool smarter than typical scanners.
summary.zh: 比一般掃描器更聰明的開源依賴安全工具。

highlight.en: LunaSec built LunaTrace, a hosted open-source dependency security tool backed by experts who monitor attacks and write guides to help patch in hours.
highlight.zh: LunaSec 打造 LunaTrace,一款由專家支援、監控攻擊並撰寫修補指南的代管開源依賴安全工具,能在數小時內完成修補;該公司現已停業。

summary.en: Supercharged deployment previews of your frontend for fast feedback.
summary.zh: 為前端提供強化版部署預覽,加速回饋。

highlight.en: FeaturePeek overlays a drawer on your site so reviewers can take annotated screenshots, record screens, comment, and file tickets, just by deploying.
highlight.zh: FeaturePeek 在網站上疊加一個抽屜介面,讓審查者只需部署即可截圖加註、錄製螢幕、留言並建立工單,無需任何依賴或程式碼變更。

summary.en: Lightwell is a B2B startup from the Summer 2019 YC batch.
summary.zh: Lightwell 是 2019 年夏季 YC 梯次的 B2B 新創公司。

highlight.en: Lightwell operates in the B2B sector; no further public description is available in the source data.
highlight.zh: Lightwell 屬於 B2B 領域;來源資料中未提供更多公開描述。

summary.en: Save, organize, and showcase your mental dump from any app or website.
summary.zh: 從任何應用或網站儲存、整理並展示你的思緒收藏。

highlight.en: Odin lets users save and organize posts, text, and pictures from all apps and websites, then showcase them through customizable spaces they design.
highlight.zh: Odin 讓用戶儲存並整理來自所有應用與網站的貼文、文字與圖片,再透過自行設計的客製化空間展示。

summary.en: A hybrid agent-and-tech process that puts home buying on autopilot.
summary.zh: 結合經紀人與科技的流程,讓買房自動化。

highlight.en: Hutsy guides buyers from searching and submitting offers to closing, finding the best local agents, lenders, and inspectors, with a dashboard to track it all.
highlight.zh: Hutsy 引導買家從搜尋、出價到完成交割,媒合最佳的在地經紀人、貸款方與驗屋師,並以儀表板追蹤成本與進度。

summary.en: An all-in-one virtual office for remote teams.
summary.zh: 為遠端團隊打造的一站式虛擬辦公室。

highlight.en: Vizy is a cross-platform click-to-talk collaboration tool with NLP transcription, screen sharing, multiplayer app collaboration, and voice and video channels.
highlight.zh: Vizy 是跨平台的點擊即通協作工具,具備自然語言轉錄、螢幕分享、多人應用協作,以及語音與視訊頻道。

summary.en: Lets you make pro-quality graphics without being a pro designer.
summary.zh: 讓你不必是專業設計師也能做出專業級圖像。

highlight.en: Playground combines AI research and product design to invent new kinds of creative tools for making graphics.
highlight.zh: Playground 結合 AI 研究與產品設計,打造製作圖像的新型創意工具。

summary.en: A LinkedIn alternative where profiles are built on credible recommendations.
summary.zh: 以可信推薦為基礎打造個人檔案的 LinkedIn 替代品。

highlight.en: Souffle Club builds a LinkedIn 2.0 around credible peer recommendations rather than resumes, mapping a global trust graph of who trusts whom and why.
highlight.zh: Souffle Club 打造以可信同儕推薦而非履歷為核心的 LinkedIn 2.0,描繪一張全球信任圖譜,記錄誰在何種情境下信任誰。

summary.en: Building a neural engine for autonomous robots from first principles.
summary.zh: 從第一性原理打造自主機器人的神經引擎。

highlight.en: Well Principled is building a new AI architecture for continual learning, goal discovery, and novel planning, beyond the limits of brute-force pretraining.
highlight.zh: Well Principled 正打造一套支援持續學習、目標發現與創新規劃的新 AI 架構,跳脫暴力預訓練的侷限,以支援技術工種。

summary.en: Develops medications to treat substance abuse, starting with stimulants.
summary.zh: 開發治療物質濫用的藥物,從興奮劑成癮著手。

highlight.en: EncepHeal develops atypical dopamine-transporter inhibitors as a small-molecule therapy for cocaine and meth addiction, where no FDA-approved treatments exist.
highlight.zh: EncepHeal 開發非典型多巴胺轉運體抑制劑作為小分子療法,治療古柯鹼與甲基安非他命成癮等目前無 FDA 核准療法的領域。

summary.en: Uses cooling to prevent brain damage during stroke; acquired by Penumbra.
summary.zh: 以降溫技術防止中風時的腦損傷,已被 Penumbra 收購。

highlight.en: Voyage Biomedical developed a cooling approach to end brain damage during stroke and was acquired by Penumbra (NYSE: PEN).
highlight.zh: Voyage Biomedical 開發以降溫終止中風期間腦損傷的方法,後被 Penumbra(NYSE: PEN)收購。

summary.en: Turns any website into an API for programmatic access.
summary.zh: 將任何網站轉為 API,以便程式化存取。

highlight.en: Dashblock is the easiest way to access websites programmatically and collect structured data.
highlight.zh: Dashblock 是以程式化方式存取網站並蒐集結構化資料最簡便的方法。
